channel.title: Frida on Android on
channel.description: Recent content in Frida on Android on

item.title: Frida on Android - Hooking Native Libraries
item.description:
Introduction

In this part of the Frida on Android series, I’ll show you how to properly hook functions from Android native libraries using Frida.

Unfortunately, I see so many online sources providing bad examples and tutorials on this subject. They either don’t understand how Frida handles native hooks, or worse, they simply ignore the problem.

I created a demo application to demonstrate the issues that can arise from doing thins wrong, and why the method I’m showing solves them.
